vocab.search: Implement search using the native filter() array method and input event listeners. For API-backed search, use fetch() with AbortController to cancel stale requests. Debounce with setTimeout.
vocab.loading: Toggle a CSS class (e.g. .is-loading) or use the disabled attribute. Use the HTML dialog element or a CSS-only spinner. Avoid third-party libraries for simple loading states.
vocab.authentication: Use httpOnly cookies set by the server. Read auth state via a /me or /session API endpoint. Do not store tokens in localStorage — it is accessible to any script on the page.
vocab.api: Use the native fetch() API with async/await. Handle errors by checking response.ok. Use AbortController for request cancellation. For complex cases, group API calls in a dedicated api.js module.
vocab.dom: Use querySelector and querySelectorAll for DOM selection. Use addEventListener for events. Prefer data attributes (data-*) for state. Avoid innerHTML where possible — use textContent or createElement.
